name: White Tea
shortDescription: Refined white tea for elevated tea moments, gifting, and a softer everyday ritual.
description: Agree Superfoods White Tea is a delicate premium tea for quiet routines and a more elevated tea shelf.
fullDescription: White tea brings a lighter, more refined feel to the Agree Superfoods tea collection. It is well suited to customers who enjoy a quieter tea ritual and want something that feels slightly more special than an everyday staple.
The product is presented with restrained, premium language focused on taste, ritual, and product character. That makes it a strong fit for gifting, curated tea sets, and a premium brand impression.
benefits: Adds a refined tea option to the collection
Suitable for quieter routines and premium gifting
Broadens the tea category with a softer taste profile
usageIdeas: Enjoy during quiet morning or afternoon tea moments
Add to gifting hampers and curated tea selections
Serve when you want a lighter, more delicate tea experience
bestFor: Customers looking for a refined tea option
Premium gift sets and curated tea assortments
Tea shelves that need an elevated category expression

productDetails.label: Storage
productDetails.value: Keep sealed in a cool, dry place away from odours

highlights.title: Taste
highlights.description: A lighter tea profile for customers who prefer gentle everyday rituals.

highlights.title: Use
highlights.description: A natural fit for gifting, curated tea sets, and quiet breaks.

highlights.title: Range role
highlights.description: Adds depth and elevation to the Agree tea collection.

faqs.question: How is white tea positioned in the range?
faqs.answer: It is presented as the most refined tea in the collection, suited to lighter and more elevated tea moments.

faqs.question: Is white tea suitable for gifting?
faqs.answer: Yes. Its premium feel makes it a strong addition to gifting assortments and curated tea selections.
